name: Labeled sample descriptors for enrichment hit-rate testing
description: Synthetic but realistic raw bank/card descriptors labeled with expected merchantId/category. A test passes when the pipeline resolves the expected merchantId, or (when merchantId is null) the expected category. Target: >=80% recognition.
